◆
Who

A Conversation
with the Cards

I picked up my first Rider-Waite-Smith deck of tarot at age 16. Since then, I have not been able to put them down and have dedicated myself to learning the language of tarot. For the last 37 years I have continually developed a connection with my cards, and up to this day still discover something new every year about the secret of the tarot.

For me, every reading is literally a conversation with the tarot. We become one, we join forces. The cards surface what is already known inside; I simply hold the light so you can see your path clearly. My intuition along with the symbols presented by the cards makes us a magical duo. It is with this amazing teamwork that I am able to passionately and lovingly read for my clients.

Every session is unique. Before the initial layout of the cards, after the client has shuffled, I also shuffle, and it is at this 'preparing stage of the reading' that I start off with communicating any messages I receive from the other realm. This can be anything about things going on in your life to loved ones that have crossed over coming through. This initial part of the pre-reading stage is very special to me. It's a time when I am very vulnerable as I have opened myself up to other lovely energies that have messages for my clients — and for this gift I am truly grateful.

◇
What I Offer

Sessions

🌙 Single Card Pull

One question, one card. A focused reading on the energy of the moment or a precise question you carry.

30 min · AUD $65
✦ Celtic Cross

The classic ten-card spread. A full panorama of past, present, and the path ahead.

60 min · AUD $120
💎 Monthly Reading

An in-depth reading that focuses on 13 different areas of your life for the month ahead — current energy, finances, family, your home, social life, health, work, love and relationships, what is ending and beginning, travel, hopes and ambitions, friendships, and your fears, with a final outcome card for the month.

90 min · AUD $180
◆
Gather

Girls' Night In

A magical evening of connection, insight and fun — a night of sisterhood and self-discovery.

Gather your closest girlfriends for an unforgettable night. Explore your path, find guidance, and share laughter. Let Tatiana bring wisdom and light to your gathering.

There will be crystals, oracle cards, and pendulums for you to indulge in while you wait for your reading.

What's Included

  • A professional tarot reading — one hour per person
  • Your reading covers 12 different areas of your life
  • Crystals, oracle cards & pendulums to enjoy while you wait
AUD $100 per person

Minimum group size: 4 guests

🜁 Begin

The Cards
Are Waiting

Sessions are available via WhatsApp call or video call — whichever you prefer — or in person. To book, simply send me a message letting me know which session you would like and whether you'd prefer a call, video call, or to meet in person.
